segments.text: If this is a medical emergency, please hang up and dial 911.
You are speaking with me.
How can I help you?
I need to speak to a live person.
I can often help right away.
Is this about an appointment, medications,
or something else?
Medication.
I can help with many medication requests right away.
Are you looking for a prescription refill,
a change to your medication,
or something else related to your medication?
Prescription refill.
To help with your prescription refill,
what is your first name and what is your date of birth? 124 1969. Please wait
while I find your record. I have found your record. What is the name and dosage
of the medication you need a refill for? Amberle. Could you please tell me the
name and dosage of the medication you would like to refill? I did not catch
that. Could you please repeat the name and dosage of the medication you need
a refill. I will connect you with our staff so they can assist you directly with your
medication request. It looks like I was not able to connect you to a staff member just
